backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for BOBLand bistro app managing menu items, pre-orders, reviews, user profiles, gallery images, contact/location info, and site publication with role-based access control and blob storage registry.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the React app router (App.tsx) is configured to exclude `/.well-known/*` paths from TanStack Router so they are served as static files for ICP custom domain DNS verification.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Structured summaries of all frontend source files describing the purpose and key features of each component, page, hook, and context in the React application.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the app into a `#root` div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/public/.well-known/ic-domains: ICP custom domain verification file containing the canister ID used for DNS validation of the custom domain.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app entry point configuring TanStack Router with explicit named routes (no wildcard), wrapping the app in ThemeProvider, QueryClientProvider, and CartProvider, with a comment documenting that `/.well-known/*` paths are intentionally excluded from routing.
frontend/src/components/admin/DomainVali: An admin panel component for managing custom domain validation, including setting IC domain validation content, copying CNAME/token values, and checking domain accessibility.
frontend/src/components/admin/MenuManage: An admin panel component for managing menu items organized by category, supporting add, edit, delete, image upload, and seeding default items via tabbed category views.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrderManag: Admin component that displays and manages pre-orders in a table, allowing status updates (pending/confirmed/completed/cancelled) with delivery or pickup type details shown in Romanian.
frontend/src/components/admin/Reservatio: Empty file with no content, likely a placeholder for a future reservation management admin component.
frontend/src/components/admin/ReviewMode: Admin component that lists customer reviews in a table and allows moderators to approve or reject pending reviews, displaying star ratings, comments, and status badges in Romanian.
frontend/src/components/DeliveryTimeSlot: Radio group component for selecting a delivery time slot from four predefined two-hour windows, with highlighted selection styling.
frontend/src/components/FloatingCartButt: Fixed floating button showing cart item count and total price that navigates to the order page, hidden on the order page or when the cart is empty.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying the BOB Land logo, dynamically fetched contact info and opening hours from the backend, and a branded attribution line.
frontend/src/components/GoLiveButton.tsx: A button component that allows admins to publish or republish the site, showing confirmation and success dialogs, and displaying a 'Live' badge when the site is already published.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: The site header with navigation links, Internet Identity login/logout, and an admin-only GoLiveButton; supports both desktop and mobile layouts.
frontend/src/components/MenuItemCard.tsx: A card component that displays a menu item's image, name, description, and price, with an 'Add to cart' button that triggers a toast notification.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/RestaurantInfoBa: A banner section displaying restaurant info (phone, hours, location, minimum order) fetched from the backend, with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/contexts/CartContext.tsx: React context provider that manages shopping cart state, exposing functions to add, remove, update quantity, clear items, and compute total price and item count.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, identity persistence, and exposing status flags via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for the application, covering user profiles, admin checks, site publication, domain validation, menu items, reviews, pre-orders, and other backend interactions with toast notifications.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that configures Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines CSS custom properties for a warm food-delivery color theme in both light and dark modes, plus a fade-in animation.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider contexts.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin-only dashboard page with tabs for managing menu items, orders, reviews, and domain validation, plus a GoLiveButton.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page displaying email, phone numbers, and location/hours info fetched from backend queries with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/GalleryPage.tsx: Gallery page that fetches and displays category images and regular gallery images in a grid layout with category badges.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page with a hero section, restaurant info banner, value propositions, and a specialties preview grid.
frontend/src/pages/MenuPage.tsx: Menu page that fetches menu items and displays them in filterable category tabs with icons and a scrollable tab list.
frontend/src/pages/OrderPage.tsx: Order checkout page that collects customer details, delivery address, time slot, and payment method, then submits a PreOrder to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/ReservationPage.tsx: Empty reservation page file with no content.
frontend/src/pages/ReviewsPage.tsx: React page that displays approved customer reviews with an average star rating summary and a form allowing users to submit new reviews with name, star rating, and comment fields.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended border radii, box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking existing features (serving .well-known paths without auth interference in the React router) and a pending action request to implement .well-known path handling for custom domain DNS verification.
